Brent Plater, Plaintiff in Pro Per via zoom, 415-648-4459
Sean Peruzzi Esq., Tharpe & Howell LLP, 818-205-9955, via zoom for defendants

Mr. Plater contests to the tentative. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BRENT PLATER MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is DENIED.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
